text:
On Thu, May 29, 2008 at 08:43:20AM -0400, Peter Thoenen wrote:
> Odd ... couple questions as I don't get:
> 
> 1: Does the entire process exit here or does it just print that then

It stops there (otherwise I wouldn't have complained)

> 2: What version of FBSD?

6.3.

It happens in a jailed system without any third parties, except the
dependend packages, installed.

Edwin
